zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda of Apulia於大約1059年出生在法國諾門迪曼其豪迪維爾-拉-吉哈德時，她的父親Roberto "Giscardo" de Hauteville45歲，母親Sikelgaita of Salerno21歲。她於1078年與Ramon Berenguer II de Barcelona在西班牙卡塔倫亞巴薩隆拿艾爾 巴瑟隆斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1112年6月6日在西班牙卡塔倫亞比斯巴特 德 赫羅納享年54歲，埋葬在西班牙卡塔倫亞赫羅納。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matilda of Apulia于大约1059年出生在法国諾門迪曼其豪迪維爾-拉-吉哈德时，她的父亲Roberto "Giscardo" de Hauteville45岁，母亲Sikelgaita of Salerno21岁。她于1078年与Ramon Berenguer II de Barcelona在西班牙卡塔倫亞巴薩隆拿艾爾 巴瑟隆斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1112年6月6日在西班牙卡塔倫亞比斯巴特 德 赫羅納享年54岁，埋葬在西班牙卡塔倫亞赫羅納。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda of Apulia was born about 1059, in Hauteville-la-Guichard, Manche, Normandy, France, her father, Roberto "Giscardo" de Hauteville, was 45 and her mother, Sikelgaita of Salerno, was 21. She married Ramon Berenguer II de Barcelona in 1078, in el Barcelonès, Barcelona, Catalonia, Spain. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 6 June 1112, in Diocese of Girona, Catalonia, Spain, at the age of 54, and was buried in Girona, Catalonia, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda of Apulia est née environ 1059, à Hauteville-la-Guichard, Manche, Normandie, France, son père, Roberto "Giscardo" de Hauteville, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Sikelgaita of Salerno, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Ramon Berenguer II de Barcelona en 1078, à el Barcelonès, Barcelona, Catalunya, Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 6 juin 1112, à Bisbat de Girona, Catalunya, Espagne, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à Girona, Catalunya, Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matilda of Apulia um 1059 in Hauteville-la-Guichard, Manche, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roberto "Giscardo" de Hauteville 45 und ihre Mutter Sikelgaita of Salerno 21. Sie hat 1078 in el Barcelonès, Barcelona, Catalunya, Spanien Ramon Berenguer II de Barcelona geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 6. Juni 1112 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Bisbat de Girona, Catalunya, Spanien und wurde in Girona, Catalunya, Spanien begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda of Apuliaが約1059年にフランスノーマンディマンチェハウテヴィレ-ラ-グイチャードで生まれた時，父Roberto "Giscardo" de Hautevilleは45歳，母Sikelgaita of Salernoは21歳であった。1078年にスペインカタルニーアバーセロナエル バーセロンeスでRamon Berenguer II de Barcelonaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1112年6月6日にスペインカタルニーアビスバト ド ギロナで54歳で死去し，スペインカタルニーアギロナにて埋葬された。

ko.Sant Feliu de Buixalleu,17451,Gérone,Cat: 스페인 카털니아 지로나 산트 펠리우 데 버이스알레우
ko.lifeSummary: Matilda of Apulia(이)가 대략 1059년 프랑스 노먼디 먼체 하테비레-라-길처드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roberto "Giscardo" de Hauteville(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sikelgaita of Salerno(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1078년 스페인 카털니아 바셀나 엘 바셀e스에서 Ramon Berenguer II de Barcelona(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1112년 6월 6일 스페인 카털니아 비스바트 데 지로나에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 카털니아 지로나에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda of Apulia родилась около 1059 г. в местности хаутевилле-ла-гуичард, манч, норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Roberto "Giscardo" de Hauteville было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Sikelgaita of Salerno, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ramon Berenguer II de Barcelona в 1078 г. в местности эл барселонeс, барселона, каталуня, Испания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 6 июня 1112 г. в местности бисбат де гирона, каталуня, Испания в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности гирона, каталуня, Испания.

Se casó con Ramon Berenguer II de Barcelona en 1078, en Barcelonés, Barcelona, Cataluña, España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 6 de junio de 1112, en Diócesis de Gerona, Cataluña, España, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultada en Gerona, Cataluña, España.
